description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular structure with a red gable roof and a brick-textured exterior. The front facade includes a small covered porch with a flat roof, a central door, and several symmetrically arranged windows with white trim. A prominent brick chimney rises from one side of the roof, and a metallic antenna is mounted at the roof's peak. The building is surrounded by concrete walkways leading to the entrance and extending to the side, suggesting integration with urban sidewalks. The windows are evenly distributed on all visible sides, and a small green awning is present over a side window, adding a touch of color contrast.
description: A red-roofed, brick-textured bungalow with a covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and a prominent chimney, surrounded by concrete walkways.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gable roof, multiple windows, and the brick chimney on the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, central entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the porch, walkway, and a green awning over a side window.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back wall with several windows and the chimney visible on the roof.
